data.title: The $6.6 Trillion Question: Can Markets Weather Triple Witching And Hawkish Fed Signals? Here's What This Analyst Says
data.description: Following Fed's hawkish cut, Wall Street is bracing for Friday's 'Triple Witching' session which will see $6.6 trillion options expiring.

data.title: Sidus Space Closes $14.1 Million Capital Raise: Details
data.description: Sidus Space shares are down in premarket trading after the company closed a $14.1 million private placement offering.

data.title: US Dollar Hits New Higher While Asia And Europe Markets Slide, Oil Drops On China Demand Fears - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: U.S. markets mixed on Thursday with flat stocks, revised Q3 GDP of 3.1%, and lower jobless claims. Asia markets down, Europe follows, oil prices decline.

data.title: SpaceX To Launch 2 More Private Astronaut Missions To ISS
data.description: Elon Musk-led SpaceX on Thursday secured a contract to conduct two additional private astronaut missions to the ISS.
